COMMENT=TESS Sector 42 full-frame images; photometry extracted with
COMMENT=tess-asteroids v1.5.1 (Tuson et al. 2026, doi:10.5281/zenodo.19222134),
COMMENT=PRF fitting along the moving track with local background modeling.
COMMENT=JD are TESS BTJD (BJD_TDB) converted to approximate UTC (-69.184 s);
COMMENT=no asteroid light-time correction; barycentric-vs-geocentric offset
COMMENT=is <= ~500 s, negligible for the multi-hour periods reported.
COMMENT=Magnitudes are calibrated TESS-band (T) values on the TESS zero point;
COMMENT=T is a broad red band closest to Cousins I, reported as MAGBAND=I.
COMMENT=Quality cuts: mag err < 1.0 and iterated bright-side robust clip
COMMENT=(reject mag < median - 4*MAD) to remove background-star crossings.
COMMENT=Family: main belt. Adopted rotation period 3.803 h (2P),
COMMENT=house convention: amplitude-first (amp>0.40 mag) + asymmetry-override
COMMENT=doubling, adversarially verified against raw photometry. status=CONFIRMED.
COMMENT=Note: VIRGIN first det; sub-barrier 1.90h REFUTED->doubled (odd-harm F-test+null significant all 3 sectors); D=7.3km
COMMENT=OBJECTNAME defaults to the bare object number: no local provisional-
COMMENT=designation table was available for this family; verify/replace before
COMMENT=the manual alcdef.org upload if a proper designation is known.
COMMENT=Associated second MPB paper is in preparation (not yet submitted);
COMMENT=this export is prep-only.
ENDMETADATA

STARTMETADATA
REVISEDDATA=FALSE
SUBMITPDS=TRUE
OBJECTNUMBER=2828
OBJECTNAME=2828
SESSIONDATE=2021-09-28
SESSIONTIME=19:27:25
CONTACTNAME=S. Landi
CONTACTINFO=[simonluca.landi@gmail.com] Varedo (MB), Italy
OBSERVERS=Landi, S.
FACILITY=NASA Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite (TESS)
MPCCODE=C57
TELESCOPE=TESS 10.5-cm f/1.4 camera
DETECTOR=CCD (TESS CCID-80)
EXPJD=MID
FILTER=C
MAGBAND=I
DIFFERMAGS=FALSE
STANDARD=INTERNAL
CICORRECTION=FALSE
LTCAPP=NONE
LTCTYPE=NONE
REDUCEDMAGS=NONE
DELIMITER=PIPE
COMMENT=TESS Sector 43 full-frame images; photometry extracted with
COMMENT=tess-asteroids v1.5.1 (Tuson et al. 2026, doi:10.5281/zenodo.19222134),
COMMENT=PRF fitting along the moving track with local background modeling.
COMMENT=JD are TESS BTJD (BJD_TDB) converted to approximate UTC (-69.184 s);
COMMENT=no asteroid light-time correction; barycentric-vs-geocentric offset
COMMENT=is <= ~500 s, negligible for the multi-hour periods reported.
COMMENT=Magnitudes are calibrated TESS-band (T) values on the TESS zero point;
COMMENT=T is a broad red band closest to Cousins I, reported as MAGBAND=I.
COMMENT=Quality cuts: mag err < 1.0 and iterated bright-side robust clip
COMMENT=(reject mag < median - 4*MAD) to remove background-star crossings.
COMMENT=Family: main belt. Adopted rotation period 3.803 h (2P),
COMMENT=house convention: amplitude-first (amp>0.40 mag) + asymmetry-override
COMMENT=doubling, adversarially verified against raw photometry. status=CONFIRMED.
COMMENT=Note: VIRGIN first det; sub-barrier 1.90h REFUTED->doubled (odd-harm F-test+null significant all 3 sectors); D=7.3km
COMMENT=OBJECTNAME defaults to the bare object number: no local provisional-
COMMENT=designation table was available for this family; verify/replace before
COMMENT=the manual alcdef.org upload if a proper designation is known.
COMMENT=Associated second MPB paper is in preparation (not yet submitted);
COMMENT=this export is prep-only.
ENDMETADATA

STARTMETADATA
REVISEDDATA=FALSE
SUBMITPDS=TRUE
OBJECTNUMBER=2828
OBJECTNAME=2828
SESSIONDATE=2021-11-03
SESSIONTIME=03:46:40
CONTACTNAME=S. Landi
CONTACTINFO=[simonluca.landi@gmail.com] Varedo (MB), Italy
OBSERVERS=Landi, S.
FACILITY=NASA Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite (TESS)
MPCCODE=C57
TELESCOPE=TESS 10.5-cm f/1.4 camera
DETECTOR=CCD (TESS CCID-80)
EXPJD=MID
FILTER=C
MAGBAND=I
DIFFERMAGS=FALSE
STANDARD=INTERNAL
CICORRECTION=FALSE
LTCAPP=NONE
LTCTYPE=NONE
REDUCEDMAGS=NONE
DELIMITER=PIPE
COMMENT=TESS Sector 44 full-frame images; photometry extracted with
COMMENT=tess-asteroids v1.5.1 (Tuson et al. 2026, doi:10.5281/zenodo.19222134),
COMMENT=PRF fitting along the moving track with local background modeling.
COMMENT=JD are TESS BTJD (BJD_TDB) converted to approximate UTC (-69.184 s);
COMMENT=no asteroid light-time correction; barycentric-vs-geocentric offset
COMMENT=is <= ~500 s, negligible for the multi-hour periods reported.
COMMENT=Magnitudes are calibrated TESS-band (T) values on the TESS zero point;
COMMENT=T is a broad red band closest to Cousins I, reported as MAGBAND=I.
COMMENT=Quality cuts: mag err < 1.0 and iterated bright-side robust clip
COMMENT=(reject mag < median - 4*MAD) to remove background-star crossings.
COMMENT=Family: main belt. Adopted rotation period 3.803 h (2P),
COMMENT=house convention: amplitude-first (amp>0.40 mag) + asymmetry-override
COMMENT=doubling, adversarially verified against raw photometry. status=CONFIRMED.
COMMENT=Note: VIRGIN first det; sub-barrier 1.90h REFUTED->doubled (odd-harm F-test+null significant all 3 sectors); D=7.3km
COMMENT=OBJECTNAME defaults to the bare object number: no local provisional-
COMMENT=designation table was available for this family; verify/replace before
COMMENT=the manual alcdef.org upload if a proper designation is known.
COMMENT=Associated second MPB paper is in preparation (not yet submitted);
COMMENT=this export is prep-only.
ENDMETADATA
